name: Foreign-Derived Deduction Eligible Income (FDDEI) Deduction

eligibility.description: Applies to domestic corporations with income from property sold for foreign use or services provided to persons/property outside the U.S.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows domestic corporations to deduct 33.34% of foreign-derived deduction eligible income and 40% of net CFC tested income (GILTI) included in gross income.
